• Implements a full‑screen miner game with procedural terrain, mining, building, and realtime multiplayer.
  • Features a modular UI: mobile controls, HUD gauges, minimap, chat, admin panel, shop, warp portal, settings and custom texture loading.
  • Includes sound engine, host election, autosave, cloud sync, and a custom modal system for prompts, confirmations, forms and trade dialogs.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    const Sound = new SoundManager();

This code creates a procedurally generated world where players mine resources with tiered drills, trade items, and purchase upgrades. The engine handles rendering, physics, networking, and UI interactions while allowing custom textures and persistent player progress.
